patterns_recognized: Starred F1 (F1_xera_gap*) without F3 corroboration repeats as the key structural weakness: LAD@NYY (F1*=1.61, no F3) and CHW@TOR (F1*=1.87, no F3) mirror the 7/12 SEA@TB 8-2 blowout loss. Both DOWNGRADED to SKIP per the 7/12 lesson requiring F3>=1000 as a third independent anchor.

CAP 7 fired on the smallest observed bullpen gap (+0.0117 for TB@BOS), well below the 0.04 meaningful threshold flagged by 7/10 and 7/12 postgames as a potential false-negative zone. Pre-cap A- stack on TB@BOS is the strongest cap-suppressed pick on the slate -- worth tracking directionally for future CAP 7 threshold calibration.

D-grade dual-opposing signals (SP xERA against + PQI against) appear on PIT@CLE, MIN@CHC, and SF@SEA -- all SKIP confirmed. Per 7/9 and 7/11 archive, D-grade + Stage-delta >0.15 is a directional fade signal (opposing team more likely to win), but no OVERRIDE to the opposing team is warranted -- direction remains ambiguous, suppression is the correct response.

Stage 2 full-game direction continues to outperform Stage 1 F5 in high-delta cases (f5_full_delta > 0.12): TEX@ATL (delta=0.172), MIN@CHC (delta=0.176), STL@ARI (delta=0.186) all show directional disagreement. The 7/11-7/16 four-case archive validates Stage 2 as the authoritative read at high delta; do not treat Stage 1 lean as an override signal.

PLATINUM picks with negative edge plus acute_roster and confidence_downgrade flags (MIA@MIL) remain at the highest suspicion tier: historical PLATINUM hit rate ~43% combined with today's multi-flag configuration warrants DOWNGRADE to SKIP.

TB @ BOS.reasoning: Pre-cap A- (SP edge +2.37 xERA, PQI +35.7, Stage agree) but no F-signal fires. CAP 7 fired on a marginal bullpen gap (+0.0117, well below the 0.04 meaningful threshold flagged in 7/10 and 7/12 postgames as potential overcapture). CAP 10 also suppressed to zero. BvP is entirely NO_DATA for both sides. Without an F-signal as a fourth dimension, the CAP 10 rescue criteria (F+SP+PQI+Stage all four simultaneously) are not met. CONFIRM SKIP.

LAD @ NYY.reasoning: F1 is starred (Roki Sasaki thin Statcast sample, F1*=1.61) with no F3 corroboration -- the exact pattern that produced the 7/12 SEA@TB 8-2 blowout loss. 7/12 lesson: starred-F1 requires F3>=1000 as an independent third anchor; without it, F1 and the SP xERA edge share the same sparse pool and are partially redundant, not independent corroborators. Freddie Freeman is also an OWNER vs Gerrit Cole (22 PA, shrunk OPS 0.863). CAP 7 (+0.0176) and CAP 10 both fired. DOWNGRADE from GOLD to SKIP.

PIT @ CLE.reasoning: D grade despite GOLD tier label: SP edge 0.81 xERA opposes CLE (-2), PQI -6.6 opposes CLE (-1), negative edge (-2.96pp), confidence_downgrade=True, and f5_full_delta=0.2437 (Stage 1 gives CLE 75.65% F5 but Stage 2 only 51.29% full-game). Per 7/9 archive, D-grade + Stage-delta >0.15 is a directional fade. F5_bullpen_gap=+0.95 is the sole positive and cannot overcome three opposing indicators. DOWNGRADE from GOLD to SKIP.

TEX @ ATL.reasoning: Market gives TEX only 30.8% win probability (fair_prob=0.308) vs. model's 50.8% -- a massive market-vs-model gap. SP edge 1.15 xERA opposes TEX (Chris Sale favors ATL), PQI -23.3 against TEX. ATL's Matt Olson is an OWNER vs Cal Quantrill (13 PA, shrunk OPS 0.907), adding qualitative lineup upside for ATL. Edge=+19.99pp with calibration_caution_18_25pp warning. f5_full_delta=0.172 with Stage 1 strongly favoring ATL. CONFIRM SKIP.

CHW @ TOR.reasoning: F1 starred (Spencer Miles thin sample, F1*=1.87) with no F3 -- identical structure to LAD@NYY and the 7/12 SEA@TB loss. CAP 1 fired on negative edge (-6.64pp), validating market skepticism about TOR at this price. CAP 10 also fired. BvP for both sides is essentially all NO_DATA or SMALL_SAMPLE (Miles is a new/thin-sample pitcher). No qualitative anchor to override the starred-F1 lesson or negative edge. DOWNGRADE from GOLD to SKIP.

MIA @ MIL.reasoning: PLATINUM with negative edge (-3.63pp), acute_roster warning, confidence_downgrade=True, and f5_full_delta=0.1259 showing Stage 1 giving MIA a 56.6% F5 probability (direction flip vs Stage 2's MIL full-game lean). Historical PLATINUM hit rate ~43% mandates heightened scrutiny. No BvP data. F3=3224.8 and F5_bullpen_gap=+0.87 are real but cannot carry a PLATINUM call against three compounding red flags. DOWNGRADE from PLATINUM to SKIP.

MIN @ CHC.reasoning: D grade: SP edge 1.37 xERA opposes CHC (Bailey Ober over Colin Rea), PQI -15.0 against CHC, negative edge (-8.97pp). f5_full_delta=0.1758 -- Stage 1 gives MIN 67.5% F5 probability while Stage 2 barely flips to CHC at 50.09%. Per 7/9 archive, D-grade + high-Stage-delta (>0.15) is a directional fade signal. CHC pick_prob=0.5009 is essentially a coin-flip with all major signals opposing. CONFIRM SKIP.

BAL @ HOU.reasoning: Sole staked play. F5_bullpen_gap=+0.68 and PQI +8.7 both affirm HOU. Altuve (OWNER, 20 PA, shrunk OPS 0.912) and Alvarez (OWNER, 10 PA, shrunk OPS 0.797) carry meaningful BvP history vs Kremer. Pena (#1 spot) is WEAK_VS Kremer (16 PA, shrunk 0.536) -- a partial offset. pick_prob=0.653 barely exceeds the 65% home-favorite scrutiny threshold, but the BvP and bullpen evidence are tangible non-heuristic supports. Edge=12.89pp is in valid range; CAP 7 did not fire (hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=-0.0012). CONFIRM GOLD.

SD @ KC.reasoning: D grade: Michael King (SD away SP) holds a 0.93 xERA advantage over Seth Lugo (KC), scoring -2 on SP edge. PQI -22.9 against KC. fair_prob=0.4633 -- market gives SD the slight edge. KC bullpen gap (-0.039) approaches but stays below the 0.04 meaningful threshold. Bobby Witt Jr. is SMALL_SAMPLE vs King (7 PA, shrunk OPS 0.692) -- no OWNER signal for KC's marquee hitter. Dual opposing signals with market also fading KC. CONFIRM SKIP.

CIN @ COL.reasoning: Edge=+3.10pp is below the 4pp minimum floor, triggering the why_skipped gate. CAP 10 fired at bottom-bucket pick_prob=0.533. PQI opposes CIN (delta=+18.4 favoring COL). confidence_downgrade=True. Stage 1 (f5_prob=0.5618) slightly favors COL for F5 while Stage 2 barely favors CIN (full_prob=0.4867) -- a directional flip. F5_bullpen_gap=+1.77 is the sole positive but cannot rescue below-minimum edge with PQI opposing. No BvP data. DOWNGRADE from GOLD to SKIP.

DET @ LAA.reasoning: D grade: SP edge 0.42 xERA opposes LAA (Troy Melton slightly over Reid Detmers). No F-signal and no PQI signal fire. Only Stage agree (+1) contributes a positive. fair_prob=0.494 -- market is essentially coin-flip despite model's 59.4% for LAA. No BvP data. Edge=10pp is in valid range but D grade and absence of F-signal or PQI support prevent a stake. CONFIRM SKIP.

WSH @ OAK.reasoning: model_prob=74.5% is outside the valid [0.48, 0.72] gate -- a calibration-hallucination signature consistent with HARD CAP 9. f5_full_delta=0.2638 is an extreme Stage 1/2 disagreement (Stage 1 barely gives OAK home F5 edge; Stage 2 assigns WSH 74.5% full-game). The co-occurrence of extreme model_prob with large Stage delta is the archive's hallucination signature. Edge=+19pp in the calibration_caution band; PQI -13.4 against WSH adds further skepticism. Stage 2 may be directionally correct (WSH full-game edge) but the probability is almost certainly inflated. CONFIRM SKIP.

STL @ ARI.reasoning: Edge=+16.24pp is outside the [4,15]pp upper bound, correctly triggering SKIP. PQI strongly opposes ARI (delta=-25.8; STL quality metrics dominant). f5_full_delta=0.1864 with Stage 1 slightly favoring STL for F5 (STL ~53% F5 probability) but Stage 2 strongly favoring ARI at 65.6% -- a direction flip above the 0.12 threshold. Per 7/11-7/16 archive, Stage 2 full-game direction is the authoritative read in high-delta cases, providing soft directional support for ARI. However, the strong PQI opposition and edge out of range prevent any stake. CONFIRM SKIP.

SF @ SEA.reasoning: D grade: Bryce Miller (SEA home SP) holds 1.09 xERA advantage over SF's Landen Roupp. PQI +15.5 favors SEA. fair_prob=0.3436 -- market prices SF at only 34.4% win probability vs model's 51.3%, triggering the fair_prob < 0.42 SKIP gate. Edge=+16.97pp also triggers the upper-bound SKIP gate. Both SP edge and PQI oppose SF; no BvP data. Dual independent gates firing on the strongest opposing-market configuration on the slate. CONFIRM SKIP.
